title: Hello Rust
description: Write a basic Rust program that prints 'Hello Rust!' using the println! macro.
problemStatement:
Welcome to the world of Rust! Your first task is to write a single-line Rust program within the `main` function that prints the string `"Hello Rust!"` followed by a newline.

**Requirement:** Use the `println!` macro.
hints: In Rust, `println!` is a macro, not a function, which is why it ends with an exclamation mark `!`.
